name: espn-sports
description: Search ESPN teams and players for schedules, rosters, and stats

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: search-teams
commands.title: Search Teams & Players
commands.description: Browse teams or search for players across NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, and more
commands.subtitle: ESPN

title: ESPN Sports
author: jeremy_blair
